heading: Omitted
label: 991 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for per capita payments to tribal members from funds appropriated for a certain judgment against the United States, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 87–775, § 176 Stat. 776Oct. 9, 1962
